sourceMovie.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Bourne Ultimatum works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Identity
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Ultimatum clicked for you, The Bourne Identity (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Supremacy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Ultimatum clicked for you, The Bourne Supremacy (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Salt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Ultimatum clicked for you, Salt (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Patriot Games
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Ultimatum clicked for you, Patriot Games (1992) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Clear and Present Danger

recommendations.title: RED 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Bourne Ultimatum clicked for you, RED 2 (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Bourne Ultimatum?
faq.answer: Try The Bourne Identity, The Bourne Supremacy, Salt—each shares DNA with The Bourne Ultimatum while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Bourne Ultimatum?
faq.answer: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007) is best described as Action, Drama, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Bourne Ultimatum part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Bourne Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
